---
title: "Patient Archetype Yeo17 Brain Maps"
output: html_document
params:
  input_csv: "artifacts/manual/patient_archetype_tables/patient_archetype_yeo17_summary_97411c0ec4.csv"
  output_dir: "artifacts/manual/archetype_brain_maps"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
source("_common.R")

resolve_repo_path <- function(path, must_exist = TRUE) {
  if (is.null(path) || !nzchar(path)) {
    stop("A non-empty path parameter is required.")
  }
  is_absolute <- grepl("^[A-Za-z]:[/\\\\]|^/", path)
  candidates <- if (is_absolute) c(path) else c(path, file.path("..", path))
  if (must_exist) {
    for (candidate in candidates) {
      if (file.exists(candidate)) {
        return(normalizePath(candidate, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
      }
    }
    stop(paste("Could not resolve path:", path))
  }
  candidate <- candidates[[length(candidates)]]
  normalizePath(candidate, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
}

assert_package_version <- function(pkg, minimum_version, install_hint) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop(paste0("Missing required package '", pkg, "'. Install it with: ", install_hint))
  }
  if (utils::packageVersion(pkg) < minimum_version) {
    stop(
      paste0(
        "Package '", pkg, "' must be >= ", minimum_version,
        ". Upgrade it with: ", install_hint
      )
    )
  }
}

assert_package_version("ggseg", "2.0.0", "install.packages('ggseg', repos = 'https://cloud.r-project.org')")
assert_package_version(
  "ggsegYeo2011",
  "2.0.0",
  "remotes::install_github('ggseg/ggsegYeo2011', upgrade = 'never')"
)
if (!requireNamespace("svglite", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Missing required package 'svglite'. Install it with: install.packages('svglite')")
}

library(ggseg)
library(ggsegYeo2011)
library(readr)

safe_write_csv <- function(df, path) {
  tryCatch(
    {
      readr::write_csv(df, path)
      path
    },
    error = function(err) {
      if (file.exists(path)) {
        message("Skipping CSV overwrite for locked file: ", path)
        return(path)
      }
      stop(err)
    }
  )
}

input_csv <- resolve_repo_path(params$input_csv, must_exist = TRUE)
output_dir <- ensure_output_dir(resolve_repo_path(params$output_dir, must_exist = FALSE))
output_stem <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(input_csv))

yeo17_network_order <- c(
  "VisCent",
  "VisPeri",
  "SomMotA",
  "SomMotB",
  "DorsAttnA",
  "DorsAttnB",
  "SalVentAttnA",
  "SalVentAttnB",
  "LimbicA",
  "LimbicB",
  "ContA",
  "ContB",
  "ContC",
  "DefaultA",
  "DefaultB",
  "DefaultC",
  "TempPar"
)

# Project-internal Yeo17 shorthand follows the standard 17-network order
# used in the exported Schaefer/Yeo17 labels, which maps directly to
# ggsegYeo2011 regions 17Networks_1..17.
yeo17_region_mapping <- tibble(
  network = yeo17_network_order,
  region = paste0("17Networks_", seq_along(yeo17_network_order))
)

raw_df <- readr::read_csv(input_csv, show_col_types = FALSE)
missing_cols <- setdiff(c("patient_id", "archetype", yeo17_network_order), names(raw_df))
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Input CSV is missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
}

n_patients_total <- dplyr::n_distinct(raw_df$patient_id)

summary_long <- raw_df %>%
  dplyr::select(patient_id, archetype, dplyr::all_of(yeo17_network_order)) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = dplyr::all_of(yeo17_network_order),
    names_to = "network",
    values_to = "loading"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(archetype, network) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_loading = if (all(is.na(loading))) NA_real_ else mean(loading, na.rm = TRUE),
    support_n = sum(!is.na(loading)),
    support_fraction = support_n / n_patients_total,
    n_patients = n_patients_total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(yeo17_region_mapping, by = "network") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    network = factor(network, levels = yeo17_network_order),
    archetype = factor(archetype, levels = sort(unique(archetype))),
    archetype_label = format_archetype_label(archetype, sort(unique(archetype)))
  )

summary_wide <- summary_long %>%
  dplyr::select(archetype, network, mean_loading) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = network, values_from = mean_loading) %>%
  dplyr::select(archetype, dplyr::all_of(yeo17_network_order)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(archetype)

support_wide <- summary_long %>%
  dplyr::select(archetype, network, support_n) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = network, values_from = support_n) %>%
  dplyr::select(archetype, dplyr::all_of(yeo17_network_order)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(archetype)

safe_write_csv(
  yeo17_region_mapping,
  file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_ggseg_network_mapping.csv"))
)
safe_write_csv(
  summary_wide,
  file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_ggseg_means.csv"))
)
safe_write_csv(
  summary_long,
  file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_ggseg_summary_long.csv"))
)
safe_write_csv(
  support_wide,
  file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_ggseg_support.csv"))
)

scale_limit <- max(abs(summary_long$mean_loading), na.rm = TRUE)
if (!is.finite(scale_limit) || scale_limit <= 0) {
  scale_limit <- 1
}

brain_theme <- function() {
  theme_void(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
}

build_brain_plot <- function(df, title = NULL, subtitle = NULL, show_legend = TRUE) {
  ggplot(df) +
    geom_brain(
      atlas = ggsegYeo2011::yeo17(),
      position = position_brain(hemi ~ view),
      aes(fill = mean_loading),
      colour = "grey35",
      size = 0.08
    ) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = "#2166ac",
      mid = "white",
      high = "#b2182b",
      midpoint = 0,
      limits = c(-scale_limit, scale_limit),
      oob = scales::squish,
      name = "Mean loading"
    ) +
    labs(title = title, subtitle = subtitle) +
    brain_theme() +
    theme(legend.position = if (show_legend) "bottom" else "none")
}

panel_plot <- build_brain_plot(
  summary_long,
  title = "Group SEEG field-state archetype maps in Yeo17 space",
  subtitle = paste0(basename(input_csv), " | n = ", n_patients_total, " patients")
) +
  facet_wrap(~archetype_label, ncol = 2)

panel_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_ggseg_panel.svg"))
save_panel(panel_plot, panel_path, width = 13, height = 10, dpi = 320)

single_plot_paths <- vapply(
  levels(summary_long$archetype),
  FUN.VALUE = character(1),
  FUN = function(archetype_id) {
    single_df <- dplyr::filter(summary_long, archetype == archetype_id)
    single_plot <- build_brain_plot(
      single_df,
      title = paste("Yeo17 mean loading map:", unique(single_df$archetype_label)),
      subtitle = paste0("Shared scale: +/-", format(round(scale_limit, 3), nsmall = 3))
    )
    output_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_ggseg_archetype_", archetype_id, ".svg"))
    save_panel(single_plot, output_path, width = 11, height = 6.5, dpi = 320)
  }
)
```

## Inputs

```{r input-summary}
knitr::kable(
  data.frame(
    item = c("input_csv", "output_dir", "n_patients"),
    value = c(input_csv, output_dir, n_patients_total)
  ),
  col.names = c("Item", "Value")
)
```

## Yeo17 Mapping

```{r mapping-table}
knitr::kable(yeo17_region_mapping, col.names = c("Project network", "ggseg region"))
```

## Mean Loadings

```{r mean-loadings-table}
knitr::kable(summary_wide)
```

## Brain Maps

```{r brain-maps, fig.width=13, fig.height=10}
panel_plot
```

## Outputs

```{r outputs-table}
output_manifest <- tibble(
  artifact = c(
    basename(panel_path),
    basename(single_plot_paths),
    paste0(output_stem, "_ggseg_network_mapping.csv"),
    paste0(output_stem, "_ggseg_means.csv"),
    paste0(output_stem, "_ggseg_summary_long.csv"),
    paste0(output_stem, "_ggseg_support.csv")
  ),
  path = c(
    panel_path,
    unname(single_plot_paths),
    file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_ggseg_network_mapping.csv")),
    file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_ggseg_means.csv")),
    file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_ggseg_summary_long.csv")),
    file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_ggseg_support.csv"))
  )
)
knitr::kable(output_manifest)
```
